title: Bike Touring - Germany - Netherlands to Cologne. 4-2010

All the fog. It'll be there. So anyways, looking good. Ready to go. Hello, good morning. This

Smaller. I wonder if you'll be able to hear me through all the cars. Yesterday, before yesterday,
